title.en: Are Iran the unluckiest side in World Cup history?
title.zh-CN: 伊朗是世界杯历史上最不幸的一方吗？

summary.en: Iran had a place in the last 32 of the World Cup snatched away from them at the last minute not once but twice.
summary.zh-CN: 在最后一分钟，伊朗在世界杯的最后32场比赛中被抢走了一席之地，不是一次，而是两次。

title.en: Knockouts are here - what is England's path to the final?
title.zh-CN: 淘汰赛来了--英格兰通往决赛的道路是什么？

summary.en: BBC Sport takes a look at what England will need to do to reach the final after qualifying for the knockout stages.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育台了解英格兰队在获得淘汰赛阶段资格后需要做些什么才能进入决赛。

title.en: France the team to beat? Chris Sutton predicts World Cup's last-32 matches
title.zh-CN: 法国要打败的球队？克里斯·萨顿预测世界杯的最后32场比赛

summary.en: BBC Sport's football expert Chris Sutton gives his predictions for the last-32 ties at the 2026 World Cup, including England against DR Congo.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育频道的足球专家克里斯·萨顿（ Chris Sutton ）对2026年世界杯的最后32场比赛进行了预测，其中包括英格兰对阵刚果民主共和国。

title.en: Maestro Messi scores again and breaks another record in the process
title.zh-CN: 梅西大师在此过程中再次得分并打破另一项纪录

summary.en: Lionel Messi comes off the bench to score his sixth goal of the 2026 World Cup as Argentina beat Jordan 3-1 in Dallas and becomes the first player to score in seven World Cup games in a row.
summary.zh-CN: 莱昂内尔·梅西（ Lionel Messi ）从替补席上下来，在2026年世界杯上打进了他的第六个进球，阿根廷在达拉斯以3比1击败乔丹，成为连续七场世界杯比赛中第一个进球的球员。

title.en: Austria score dramatic late equaliser against Algeria as both progress
title.zh-CN: 奥地利对阿尔及利亚取得了戏剧性的后期均衡器，因为两者都取得了进展

summary.en: Algeria and Austria produce an incredible finish to their Group J meeting, with both teams scoring in injury time to secure the point they need to reach the World Cup knockout stages - and send home...
summary.zh-CN: 阿尔及利亚和奥地利在他们的J组会议上取得了令人难以置信的成绩，两支球队都在伤病时间得分，以确保他们达到世界杯淘汰赛阶段所需的积分-并送回家......

title.en: Algeria and Austria both qualify for last 32 after dramatic injury-time goals
title.zh-CN: 阿尔及利亚和奥地利在经历了戏剧性的伤病时间进球后都有资格进入最后32场比赛

summary.en: Algeria and Austria each score injury-time goals in a 3-3 draw, a result which sees both sides qualify from Group J and into the last 32 of the FIFA World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 阿尔及利亚和奥地利各自在3-3平局中得分伤时进球，这一结果使双方都有资格从J组进入国际足联世界杯的最后32场比赛。

title.en: Messi comes off the bench to score as Argentina beat Jordan
title.zh-CN: 梅西从替补席上下来，在阿根廷击败约旦时得分

summary.en: Lionel Messi comes off the bench to become the first player in FIFA World Cup history to score in seven consecutive matches, as Argentina defeat Jordan 3-1 in their final game in Group J.
summary.zh-CN: 莱昂内尔·梅西（ Lionel Messi ）在替补席上成为FIFA世界杯历史上第一位连续七场比赛得分的球员，因为阿根廷在J组的最后一场比赛中以3-1击败乔丹。

title.en: Derided by Leeds, snubbed by USA - but Marsch becoming Canada hero
title.zh-CN: 被利兹嘲笑，被美国冷落-但Marsch成为加拿大英雄

summary.en: Derided by Leeds fans and snubbed by the USA, Jesse Marsch has faced difficult moments in his career - but appears to have found his home with Canada as they look to reach the World Cup last 16.
summary.zh-CN: 被利兹球迷嘲笑，被美国冷落，杰西·马施（ Jesse Marsch ）在他的职业生涯中面临着艰难的时刻-但似乎已经找到了他在加拿大的家，因为他们希望进入世界杯的最后16场比赛。

title.en: England last-32 tie on BBC - see full schedule
title.zh-CN: 英国广播公司的英格兰LAST-32领带-查看完整时间表

summary.en: England's World Cup last-32 game against DR Congo will be shown live on BBC One and BBC iPlayer, with all 16 first knockout round ties covered across BBC Sport.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰世界杯最后32场对阵刚果民主共和国的比赛将在BBC One和BBC iPlayer上直播， BBC Sport将覆盖所有16个首轮淘汰赛。

title.en: Big names, dark horses and subplots - reasons to watch each last 32 tie
title.zh-CN: 大牌，黑马和副情节-观看最后32个领带的原因

summary.en: BBC Sport shows why you should be interested in all of the World Cup's last-32 ties.
summary.zh-CN: BBC Sport向您展示了为什么您应该对世界杯的最后32场比赛感兴趣。

title.en: World Cup goals chart led by PSG and Real - plus Palace and Sunderland
title.zh-CN: 由PSG和Real-plus Palace和Sunderland领导的世界杯进球图表

summary.en: Crystal Palace and Sunderland lead the Premier League’s World Cup scoring charts after the 2026 group stage, ahead of Arsenal, Liverpool and Manchester City.
summary.zh-CN: 在2026年小组赛之后，水晶宫和桑德兰在英超联赛的世界杯得分榜上领先，领先于阿森纳、利物浦和曼城。

title.en: Where to watch the World Cup on the BBC and ITV
title.zh-CN: 在英国广播公司和独立电视台观看世界杯的地方

summary.en: All the TV and radio details for each of the 2026 World Cup knockout games.
summary.zh-CN: 2026年世界杯淘汰赛每场比赛的所有电视和广播细节。

title.en: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 21
title.zh-CN: 我是谁？猜猜世界杯明星21号

summary.en: Will you get today's World Cup player in as few attempts as possible?
summary.zh-CN: 你会在尽可能少的尝试中获得今天的世界杯球员吗？

title.en: Lo Celso marks his World Cup debut with a fantastic free-kick
title.zh-CN: Lo Celso以出色的任意球标志着他的世界杯首次亮相

summary.en: Giovani Lo Celso scores a fantastic free-kick on his World Cup debut to give Argentina the lead against Jordan.
summary.zh-CN: Giovani Lo Celso在世界杯首次亮相时获得了出色的任意球，让阿根廷队在对阵约旦队的比赛中领先。
